title: Fix: Remove all pricing information from service cards on Services page

requirements.text: Completely remove all pricing/cost text from every service card on the Services page (frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx). Replace any price values, pricing badges, rate text, or cost-related strings with a neutral dot placeholder ('•') or remove them entirely. No monetary values, rupee symbols, or price-related labels should be visible anywhere on the Services page.

quotes: कीमत तो अभी तक शो कर रही है

acceptanceCriteria: No rupee amounts, price numbers, or currency symbols are visible on any service card on the Services page.
No pricing badge, 'Starting at', 'From', or similar price-indicating label is rendered on any card.
All service cards that previously showed pricing now show a dot '•' or have the pricing element removed entirely.
The change applies to all service categories: internet browsing, computer rental, government document services, printing, photocopying, lamination, and any other listed services.
The visual layout and card structure remains intact after removing pricing text.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not alter any contact information (phone: 9220270576, address: Shop, Hotel SKY Blue WALI GALI, Mahipalpur, Delhi).
Do not change any other page content outside of the Services page pricing fix.
nonGoals: Adding new services or modifying service descriptions.
Changing the visual theme or card layout.
Modifying the Contact page or Footer.
